items.text:
Creative Videographer / Content Creator
Full-time • Los Angeles, CA

We are looking for a creative videographer and content creator to join our growing team working on entertainment, social media, original shows, and digital media projects.

This position is for someone who genuinely loves creating content, follows emerging trends, and is constantly improving their craft.

We are not looking for someone who simply knows how to operate a camera.

We are looking for someone who understands how modern audiences consume content, what works today, and what will work tomorrow.

We need someone who can think creatively, not just shoot.

Language Requirements

Russian is strongly preferred.

Many internal discussions and creative processes take place in Russian, so candidates should be comfortable communicating fluently in Russian.

At the same time, strong English communication skills are required, as our projects operate in the United States.

Responsibilities

* Filming interviews, podcasts, shows, and social media content.

* Creating content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other digital platforms.

* Participating in the development of new content formats and creative concepts.

* Researching and bringing new trends, references, and visual ideas to the team.

* Assisting with production preparation and content planning.

* Participating in content production and execution.

* Working with cameras, lighting, composition, and visual storytelling.

* Contributing ideas and helping develop creative solutions.

Who We’re Looking For

* Someone with strong visual taste and attention to detail.

* Someone who actively follows trends in social media, YouTube, TikTok, and digital media.

* Someone who is passionate about content creation and wants to continue growing professionally.

* Someone who works well as part of a team.

* A reliable and responsible professional.

* Someone who can receive feedback and use it as a tool for growth.

For us, great content is about more than beautiful visuals.

Understanding the objective matters just as much.

We are looking for someone who can first understand the goal, audience, and desired outcome of a project — and then find the most effective creative solution.

We highly value people who can analyze their own work, learn from mistakes, and continuously improve.

You do not need to know everything.

But you should be willing to learn, adapt, and constantly raise your own standards.

Our Philosophy

We have our own studio and access to professional production resources.

However, we believe that great content is created by ideas, not budgets.

Audiences do not come for expensive cameras or large productions.

They come for emotion, storytelling, and memorable experiences.

That is why we are looking for someone who can create content that looks bigger than its budget, understands the power of visual storytelling, and can find creative solutions where others see limitations.

We can provide the space, equipment, and opportunities.

We are looking for someone who can bring creativity, initiative, strong instincts, and a desire to create outstanding content.

What We Offer

* A starting salary.

* The opportunity to work on real entertainment, media, and digital content projects.

* The chance to contribute to original shows, interviews, social media campaigns, and new content formats.

* A creative environment where strong ideas and initiative are valued.

* Long-term opportunities for people who consistently demonstrate results, responsibility, and a desire to grow.

* Potential future participation in the company’s success through equity, options, or other long-term incentive programs for key contributors.

To Apply

Please send:

* Your resume

* Portfolio or showreel

* Links to your social media profiles (if applicable)

Please send your application to:

controlrunwin@gmail.com

We are looking for someone for the long term. Finding the right person is more important to us than filling the position quickly.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬
We are currently seeking actors for an upcoming film project.

Role Rate: $1,000

Script Length: Approximately 40 pages

We are specifically looking for:

• Male actor, age 25–40, height 6'0"–6'5"

• African American actors, ages 25–50

Please submit:

• IMDB link (if available)

• Acting reel

• Headshot

• Resume (optional)

Serious inquiries only.

📩 Send submissions to: sirrjonesproductions@gmail.com

Looking to cast quickly and move into production.

topComments.text:
-Title?
-Union/Non Union?
-Rate...per day or flat?
-Shoot Duration?
-Shoot Date?
-Location?
-Local/Nationwide Talent?
-Submission Deadline?
-Self-Tape/In-Person auditions? 
Thanks

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: Got some really lovely feedback from a production manager after a shoot, complimenting my professionalism and characterisation.
Got vip tickets to a red carpet event on 2nd July were i will be networking with top directors, actors and casting directors. Gona be fun 💪🏼

A FEW PLACES STILL AVAILABLE 

AWARD WINNING TV AND DRAMA DIRECTOR 
WORKSHOP 

DATE : 2ND AUGUST 
TIME : 2:30PM -5:30PM 
FEE: £42 

book here : https://screenplayacting.com/product/award-winning-tv-and-drama-director-mustapha-kseibati-workshop/

Mustapha Kseibati is an award-winning film and television writer and director renowned for his work across drama and comedy. In television, he has directed acclaimed series for the BBC, ITV, Channel 4, and Sky, including Waterloo Road and Hollyoaks. In film, he has developed and delivered projects for the BFI, Netflix, Sky, the BBC, and the Metropolitan Police.

sharedPost.text:
Come one, come all to @purple__productions @colonywoodstockny @cyber__circus, Freaky Fantasy Ball💋🎪 On July 18th for a one-night-only unforgettable experience where classic vintage circus glamour collides with dark electronic nightlife. An underground circus rave & variety show of freaky fantasy filled specialty acts, aerial acrobatics, pole performances, sideshow thrills, duo acts, vintage burlesque, twisted fantasy & bass-heavy dance energy. Step inside a world where the strange are celebrated & the night grows wilder as it unfolds. 🎪✨🖤

A circus isn't just a show. It's a world of wonder, mystery & illusion. A playground for the curious, the strange & beautifully unconventional. Beneath the glow of carnival lights & the pulse of dark electronic music lies a world of excitement, entertainment & beautifully twisted fantasy becoming reality as it takes center stage. Our rave isn't just a dance party. It's freedom. It's energy vibrating through your chest & strangers becoming part of the same experience.

✨INSIDE CYBER CIRCUS✨

🎭Fearless pole, aerial & specialty performances by @goddess.purple, known for bold artistry, fierce movement, & electrifying stage presence that commands any audience.

🕯Sideshow & specialty acts by @lola.strange with daring displays that push curiosity to the edge.

🎪Precision pole & aerial performances by @carolyn_tigermom, blending graceful technical mastery with captivating control.

💋Vintage burlesque by @inthenolaverse serving glamour, tease & classic showgirl elegance.

🤡Hosted by Trampy the Clown, guiding guests through a night of fantasy & twisted entertainment.

🎁Interactive contests, raffles, prizes & unexpected surprises.

🎧DJ PrOtoKilLeR aka @jesse_d_leach opens the evening before returning for the underground afterparty rave. Pulsing bass heavy EDM, Drum & Bass, Dark House & Dubstep, Industrial Goth Remixes, Electro Swing & more!

🖤Fantasy Encouraged: Leather. Lace. Chains. Harnesses. Collars. Latex. Carnival Royalty. Dark Masquerade. Glittering Oddities.

Come dressed as your best freaky fantasy- or discover it when you arrive.

🎭What's Your Fantasy?
The freaks do come out at night👽

⏰ Doors & DJ 6PM | Show 7PM

BEYOND OBSESSION – IN MY BLOOD 🩸  
Offizieller Release: Diesen Freitag!

Aber: Ihr könnt das neue Album ab sofort vorbestellen. 
Die CD gibt’s auch als signierte Edition mit persönlicher Widmung direkt von uns😎.

🎧 Ab Freitag dann überall im Streaming: Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, YouTube Music, Deezer.

Sichert euch euer Exemplar jetzt – Danke für euren Support!❤️

👉 www.beyondobsession.de

items.text:
**Statist søges til videooptagelse den 29/6 tæt ved Roskilde station**

 

**Tid:** ca. 3 timer – nærmere tidspunkt kommer senere

**Løn:** ulønnet, men du får et gavekort til 2x biograf billetter

 

👷‍♀️ **1 ung pige på ca 14 (i dit eget tøj)**

 

 

Skriv gerne til mig, hvis det er noget for dig, eller hvis du kender en, der kunne passe. På caba@detsocialenetvaerk.dk

 

 

Videoptagelsen skal bruges til at lave et online kursus for headspace Danmark, der skal inspirere til samtale.

items.text:
🎬 Darstellerin / Model für Musikvideo gesucht! (NRW, gerne auch Newcomer)

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich bin Max Konstanty :) Für den Dreh meines kommenden Musikvideos sind mein Label (END BUILD BEGIN) und ich auf der Suche nach einem weiblichen Gesicht für die Kamera. Anhand des hier gepostete Videos könnt ihr euch ein Bild von Sound und Look machen. Die neue Single (Auskopplung aus meinem Album "Luxus", das Ende August erscheint) schicken wir euch vor dem Dreh zu.

Das Projekt:
Es gibt keine komplexe Storyline oder Dialoge – der Fokus liegt komplett auf ästhetischen, cinematischen Shots, die die Stimmung des Songs einfangen. Du musst keine Texte lernen oder unbedingt Schauspielerfahrung mitbringen. Es geht um Ausstrahlung, Mimik, Posen und coole Bilder.

Wen wir suchen:

Alter: ca. 20 bis 40 Jahre

Größe: bis ca. 1,75 m

Erfahrung ist nicht zwingend notwendig!

Die Rahmendaten:

📍 Location: Niederrhein

📅 Datum: Juli/August 2026

💰 Vergütung: 200 Euro für 5-6 Stunden Dreh plus Verpflegung.

Interesse?
Dann schreib mir einfach eine kurze PN! Bitte schick direkt Folgendes mit:

1–2 aktuelle Fotos von dir, dein Alter, Größe und ungefähren Wohnort (Handybilder reichen völlig aus)

(Optional) Link zu deinem Instagram, falls du magst.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Pn und beantworte auch gerne vorab alle Fragen :) Vielen Dank.

items.text:
CASTING VOICE ACTOR

Title: Spilled Milk

Genre: Reality

Logline: In the heart of Denver’s nightlife, Spilled Milk follows a circle of bartenders, DJ’s, influencers, and club insiders whose friendships, romances, and rivalries collide both on and off the dance floor.
 
Role:
NARRATOR (male or female) Provides voiceover narration for the opening sequences and potentially future episodes.

Production Type: Reality TV Pilot

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Approx. 25 minutes

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Send email with voiceover samples, we will send additional details and a brief audition script to those we want to hear more from.

Read more about the project here:
items.previewTitle: Mile High VPR: A Denver club has started filming a reality show
items.previewDescription: "I wouldn't even compare it to any show because nothing like this has ever been done before."

topComments.text: I would be interested in applying.

items.text:
I’m testing a new production workflow (using a laptop, tablet and phone) and need a live test scenario.

Any actors in the Springs / Pueblo area want to volunteer to be part of a short drama scene? You can keep it for your reel after we are done.

Need either a monologue, or 2 actors willing to do a short drama scene.

No pay but will be happy to provide a meal and pay for gas if it’s a trip. Trade for content for new and upcoming talent in the local area.

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

Examples such as running a community football group, or events, maybe you missed a special lifetime event to attend a match, couples who have attended matches together for over 40+ years etc. All unique stories welcome. These are for shoots taking place in London, Manchester, Liverpool and Birmingham throughout June and each participant will receive a fee of £2000 for participation. For more information please email erica.stein@ladbiblegroup.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ISLANDER
WICKED FRIDAYS| NOC Theatre| London| Paid

NOC Theatre is casting Ariel in WICKED FRIDAYS a new psychological horror thriller premiering at Grim Fest 2026. 

We're looking for a Black, Mixed Heritage or Latin (South American) male performer (playing age 19–25) to portray Ariel – a charismatic, restless islander who longs for escape. Charming and magnetic, but with an unpredictable edge.

An island accent is required. Accents can include:

• Jamaican

• St. Lucian

• Bajan

• Trinidadian

• Spanish

• Portuguese

Etc.

Production Details

Paid- £600 plus performance bonus 

London

Performances: 13–17 October 2026 (Grim Fest)

Auditions

6–7 July

To apply, please send your:

* Headshot

* CV

* Spotlight link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

Please share with anyone who might be right for the role.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Hello everyone! We are going to shoot an independent short film about how busy and exhausting working and dating in London is. The duration will be about 10'. We would need one supporting woman, playing age 30-40yo, playing the lead actor's date. The filming would take place on a day between the 19th and the 21th July, in a pub. Travel expenses and meals only will be compensated. If anyone is interested please get in touch! Please send your experience, showreels, and headshots to: robert.theodor.777@gmail.com.

items.text:
Marc Graue is one of the most respected names in the voice over industry, combining decades of professional experience as a voice actor, coach, director, and legendary demo producer. Having worked with thousands of voice actors—from beginners to established professionals—Marc has helped shape successful careers across animation, video games, commercials, promos, audiobooks, and narration.
As the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over Studios, Marc provides world-class voice over coaching, personalized career guidance, professional demo production, audition training, and performance direction. His coaching focuses on helping talent discover their authentic voice, sharpen their acting skills, master today's competitive marketplace, and develop the confidence needed to book more work.
What You'll Get
When you work with Marc Graue, you receive far more than coaching—you gain a trusted mentor with decades of real-world industry experience. You'll learn how to create compelling performances, develop memorable characters, improve audition skills, understand industry expectations, and position yourself for long-term success. Whether you're pursuing commercials, animation, video games, audiobooks, or narration, Marc provides honest feedback, practical strategies, and personalized guidance designed to help you stand out.
Why Marc Graue
Marc's reputation has been built on results. His students and clients have gone on to book major projects, secure top agency representation, and build thriving voice over careers. Through expert coaching, legendary demo production, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Marc helps voice actors transform talent into opportunity and potential into success.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL 🎬

RED BRICK WAR

We are currently casting for a professionally produced Proof of Concept film for an upcoming Liverpool-based action thriller.

RED BRICK WAR is a gritty crime and action story set in Liverpool, centred around former Tier 1 operator Sonny Doyle, who returns home after his teenage nephew is left in a coma following a brutal gang attack. What begins as a hunt for those responsible quickly uncovers a far larger network involving organised crime, corruption and private military contractors operating in the shadows.

We are currently seeking actors for several principal and supporting roles, including:

• Male – 35-45 (Lead)
• Female – 30-45
• Male - 30-45 ( x3 )
• Male – 18-25
• Female – 18-25
• Supporting and featured speaking roles
• Background performers and extras
• Production specialists

Filming will take place in and around Liverpool.

This Proof of Concept is being produced to support feature film development, funding and industry pitching.

Whilst this stage of the project is unpaid, successful applicants will receive:

• Professional footage suitable for showreels
• Professional photography and behind-the-scenes content
• Full screen credit
• The opportunity to be considered for future paid production roles should the feature move into full production

Experience is welcome but not essential for all roles.

To apply, please send:

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)
• Contact details

📧 info@redbrickwar.co.uk

@redbrickwarfilm

Liverpool, UK

RED BRICK WAR

Brotherhood. Loyalty. Consequence.

SOME DEBTS ARE PAID IN BLOOD.

CASTING HORSE RACING FRIENDS 🏇

Anna McAuley Casting is seeking Northern friends and couples who love to go to the races for a biscuit brand commercial.

We’re specifically looking for: friends and couples who love to attend horse racing like The Grand National.

Filming: 22 / 23 / 24 July (Manchester)
Paid opportunity.

Applicants to be based in Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool and surrounding areas. No previous acting experience needed.

Please apply with full name, location, 
selfie, full length shot and a short written intro to: hello@mcauleycasting.com with the subject: ‘Biscuit Commercial - Race Friends’

items.text:
**THE SESSION - VFS STUDENT FILM - NON-UNION** 

Hello, I am Anastasia and I am the Line Producer for “The Session,” a student short film with Vancouver Film School. 

The premise is Niri, a psychologically fractured taxi driver under the investigation of murder, undergoes psychiatric sessions that loosens his grip on reality as he gets flashbacks - blood spreading on the floor and his father’s abuse. He sees himself killing his psychiatrist, Dr. Orms, with the very pen she is using during their session. However, she hands him a diagnosis and says he’s free to go, ending the session calmly. As he exits, Detective Fareth greets him like an old friend, yet now Niri is wearing a completely different outfit with the paper in his hand being blank - revealing that he was never free, but a psychiatric patient all along.

We are accepting submissions for all of the following roles:

**NIRI**
Male, 25-35 y.o., All ethnicities
A man misdiagnosed with schizophrenia actually suffers from DID-- two distinct identities split from his trauma: his gentle, vulnerable self and an alter driven by anger and pain. Subtle clues like memory loss, disconnection, and a history of trauma are woven into him. Deep down Niri knows the truth, but paralyzed by guilt and fear of losing control entirely, he hides it from everyone aware that whoever finds out could become the next victim.

**DR. ORMS**
Female, 40-55 y.o., All ethnicities
Dr. Katerin Orms is a calm, maternal psychiatrist who represents the last remnant of Niri's sanity, confident she can cure him. Her expertise becomes her downfall; she diagnoses him with schizophrenia but fails to see the truth he's hiding. Ironically in her case, the most experienced person in the room is the one most blind to what's really happening.

**DETECTIVE FARETH**
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
A lifetime of catching criminals has left Fareth with little patience and no apologies. He operates outside the law not out of malice, but because he knows pressure works. Decades of experience haven't slowed him down; they've just made him colder, sharper, and harder to argue with.

**THE SUSPECT**
Male, 20-30 y.o., All ethnicities
The suspect is nobody, a random guy brought into custody (not entirely legally) by the detective Fareth to answer some questions. Little did the suspect know, is that the detective just made him his twisted objective. The suspect is terrified and very easy to read. From what we hear it seems that it wasn’t his first time in custody, but we could easily deduce that he didn’t want to stay there for long-- this is why he’s agitated and afraid.

**NIRI’S FATHER **
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
Though there is no dialogue for this character, The father of Niri was a closed minded man, with an old and retrograde worldview, he served and experienced the second world war as commander, but lost all his glory and respect at the end of it. He was brainwashed with a military mindset and had PTSD. He was violent, unpredictable and angry, so he unloaded all his frustration and what he considered injustice on his innocent son

We are accepting actors from the greater Vancouver area, which is also where we will be filming.

**IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN ONE OF THESE ROLES**, please send your name, a headshot, a resume, a demo reel, and the role you are auditioning for to ***sessionwdr.o@gmail.com***. Please send by **Wednesday, June 24th, 09:00AM**. 

Chosen actors will then be requested self tapes on Wednesday, June 24th, which will be sent to the production email with more instructions in the initial request. Self tapes are due and callback requests are sent out Friday, June 26th. In-person callbacks will be held on Sunday, June 28th. **We will be shooting July 15th to July 17th. **

This is a Non-Union, Non-paid 10 minute film shot across 3 days. On set meals are fully covered. IMDB Credits provided. We will release the film online and will screen the film to applied festivals.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film
## **We are casting for Girls’ Night Out, a cinematic short film about five Black women from five African nations navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC. Each woman carries something invisible into the night. What they find in each other is what no institution could provide. The film is strictly volunteer based, targeting festival submissions. This is a portfolio piece for everyone involved.**

**We are currently looking for:**
**LEAD ROLES — All five must be women of African descent (OPEN TO ALL BLACK ACTRESSES)**

**AMARA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Sharp, always in motion, a code-switcher. Works in marketing and communications. Must be comfortable switching between Nigerian pidgin and a neutral Canadian accent.**

**NIA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Medical student. Exhausted and brilliant.**

**ZURI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. The anchor. Decisive, warm, composed. Social worker. Needs to know how to drive**

**IMANI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Playful, chaotic, observant. DJ.**

**TONI – East African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Athletic build. A bit of a tomboy. Software engineer. Private.**

**SUPPORTING ROLES & EXTRAS**

**We are intentionally casting to reflect the demographic reality of Vancouver, a city built on Indigenous land and home to one of the most diverse populations in the world. We are particularly interested in hearing from:**

**Black performers**
**Indigenous performers**
**East Asian and South Asian performers**
**White performers**

**For supporting and background roles, all backgrounds are welcome to submit.**

**No acting experience required. If you have never acted before but feel connected to one of these characters please submit. We are looking for truth, not technique.**

**This is an unpaid production (screen credit provided). Food will be provided on set. Some scenes require emotional depth, multiple takes, and reshoots.**

**To submit please send the following to: gnothefilm@gmail.com**

**Headshot or clear selfie**
**Short video introducing yourself (30–60 seconds, just talk to us, INCLUDE: NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION UNION STATUS & CULTURAL BACKGROUND)**
**Reel or any acting experience if available**
**Which role you are submitting for**
**Your contact information and location**

**Filming in Vancouver, BC Late August 2026. Even if you are not submitting, please share this with someone who might be. Every share helps us find the right people.**

Urgently seeking a male-identifying actor for "Cryptophasia"! If interested, please contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com asap!

All details at: [[https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions)](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3RXeUh4bEozcTA4WGZEMnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wuYcyKwdVXjka-8n85mtcPepsYDaVlZl5AhJEWK7jZmcpT2zQ4DYs9KYpIg_aem_JXKrh2NpoDhdGHQn3VfNXw)

**Dates:**

Rehearsals will be held June 30th through July 18th on select weekdays and Saturdays.  Rehearsal schedule is flexible for this role.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances: **July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

Compensation: $100 stipend plus portion of profits

**Show Synopsis:**

Cryptophasia (N)- The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Description:**

Unk/Dr. Truman (Male-identifying, 18+ to play 30s-60s)- Actor will double as Missy's goofy, somewhat oblivious father and Anna and Bella's caring but emotionally guarded pediatrician.

items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9mUc_Hlfd3kG0ZmA_aem_F_upAT82iJscrafN1gVYEA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)

items.text:
🎅 **Father Christmas Casting Call – 2026**
Evoke Entertainment is currently seeking **experienced Father Christmas actors** for a series of festive grotto activations across the UK.

📍 **Locations**

We are casting for the following areas:

* Herts, Rickmansworth

*Moreton-in-Marsh

🗓️ **Key Dates **

(Dates vary across venues, you do not need to be available for all) 

*Friday 4 December

* Saturday 5 December

* Thursday 10 December

* Friday 11 December

*Thursday 17 December

*Friday 18 December 

* Monday 21 December

 ⏰ **General Schedule**

* Grotto operating hours typically **between 8:30am – 6:00pm (maximum shift length)**

* Some **shorter days may apply**, to be confirmed via email

* Primarily weekend work, with additional dates in the final week before Christmas

* Full schedules and shift details will be shared privately per location

💼 **Requirements & Rates**

* **Rate of pay is £35 per hour**

* Actors with **their own beard preferred**

* Suit provided

---

 📩 **How to Apply**

Please email: **[castings@evokeents.com]

**Subject line:** *Father Christmas 2026*

Include:

* Your **preferred location(s)**

* Any relevant experience or details

We will respond with full availability schedules and next steps.

Will email Georgia looking at herts plenty of Santa experience.

* Friday 11 December

*Thursday 17 December

*Friday 18 December 

* Monday 21 December

 ⏰ **General Schedule**

* Grotto operating hours typically **between 8:30am – 6:00pm (maximum shift length)**

* Some **shorter days may apply**, to be confirmed via email

* Primarily weekend work, with additional dates in the final week before Christmas

* Full schedules and shift details will be shared privately per location

💼 **Requirements & Rates**

* **Rate of pay is £35 per hour**

* Actors with **their own beard preferred**

* Suit provided

---

 📩 **How to Apply**

Please email: **[castings@evokeents.com]

**Subject line:** *Father Christmas 2026*

Include:

* Your **preferred location(s)**

* Any relevant experience or details

We will respond with full availability schedules and next steps.
items.title: 🎅 **Father Christmas Casting Call – 2026**

items.text:
🎬 Wrocław 🎯** 3-5 LIPCA.**

Post grzecznościowy, osoba kontaktowa:
**Daniel, tel: 571 314 312 **🎥💁‍♂️

do najnowszego odcinka serialu **Trudne Sprawy** poszukiwane osoby do ról:

**1. Wiktoria Staszewska (25)** – główna bohaterka, żona Marcina, pracuje w agencji reklamowej.

***Sceny: wszystkie*** - **WYMAGANE DOŚWIADCZENIE **🎬

Wygląd: drobna, zgrabna, ubiera się modnie i z wyczuciem stylu, nosi rozpuszczone włosy, chodzi z plecakiem.

Cechy: otwarta, dobra, uczciwa i bezpośrednia. Ufa Marcinowi, jednak po informacji o jego zdradzie rozczarowuje się mężem.

**DATA 03-05.07**

**2. Michalina Wilk (24) **– córka Marcina i Katarzyny, studentka Politechniki.

***ilość scen: 5***

Wygląd: wyrazista, efektowna, lubi drogie i rzucające się w oczy rzeczy.

Cechy: zręcznie udaje szczerą, empatyczną i wyrozumiałą. W rzeczywistości żywi urazę do Marcina, przekonana, że nie dotrzymał obietnicy zapewnienia jej osobnego mieszkania.

**DATA 03 i 04.07**

**3. Piotr Zych (26)** – kolega Wiktorii z pracy, jej były partner i kolega ze studiów.

***ilość scen: 10***

Wygląd: preferuje styl sportowy, podąża za modą, zawsze zadbany i wysportowany.

Cechy: uprzejmy, uczciwy, dobry, bardzo kocha Wiktorię. Mówi spokojnie, jest opanowany.

**DATA 03 i 05.07**

**4. Patrycja Mrozek (23)** – przyjaciółka i koleżanka Wiktorii z pracy, zatrudniona w agencji reklamowej.

***ilość scen: 5***

Wygląd: ubiera się modnie, z lekką niedbałością.

Cechy: ambitna, uważa się za najzdolniejszą pracownicę w firmie. Nie akceptuje małżeństwa Wiktorii.

**DATA 03 i 05.07**

**5. Katarzyna Wilk (45) **– była żona Marcina Wilka, posiada pakiet akcji jego firmy.

***ilość scen: 2***

Wygląd: modna, ekstrawagancka, lubi jaskrawe kolory i drogą biżuterię, nosi modną fryzurę, wygląda na

zadbaną. Mówi pewnie i stanowczo.

Cechy: obsesyjnie skupiona na Marcinie, chce odzyskać byłego męża.

**DATA 03.07**

**6. Andrzej Cybulski (42)** – policjant, przyjeżdża na wezwanie Wiktorii.

***ilość scen: 2***

Wygląd: w mundurze policyjnym, uważne spojrzenie, mówi spokojnie i rozsądnie.

Cechy: profesjonalista.

**DATA 04.07**

**7. „Gazownik” 1 (26)** – mężczyzna wynajęty przez Michalinę do zastraszania Wiktorii.

***ilość scen: 2 + off***

Wygląd: w intro w kombinezonie roboczym, w scenie w parku w codziennym ubraniu.

Cechy: potrafi mówić w zastraszający sposób.

**DATA 03.07**

**8. „Gazownik” 2 (23)** – pomocnik „Gazownika” 1.

***ilość scen: 1 + off***

Wygląd: w intro w kombinezonie roboczym.

Cechy: brak.

**DATA 03.07**

**Osoby zainteresowane i dostępne w wybranym terminie proszę o kontakt TELEFONICZNY: 571 314 312 - Daniel. **👈

items.text:
🎬 CASTING DO SERIALU „ZAJAZD” 🎬
📍 Warszawa | 🎥 Nagrania: 6–10.07.2026 r.

👇 Sprawdź dostępne role:

👩 RENATA (50)
Ciepła, oddana i pracowita kobieta. Od lat opiekuje się ciężko chorym mężem, przez co zatraciła radość życia. Podczas pobytu w hotelu poznaje charyzmatycznego trenera fitness. Rodzące się między nimi uczucie stawia ją przed najtrudniejszym wyborem w życiu.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 08.07, 09.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👨 JAREK (37)
Charyzmatyczny trener fitness. Pewny siebie, wysportowany i pełen pozytywnej energii. Z łatwością zdobywa sympatię ludzi, nie przypuszczając, że jedno przypadkowe spotkanie odmieni życie jednej z uczestniczek turnusu.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 08.07, 09.07, 10.07 (4 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 KLAUDIA (25)
Puszysta, energiczna dziewczyna. Marzy o zmianie swojego życia, łatwo ulega emocjom i fascynacjom.
🎥 Nagranie: 09.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 FILIP (27)
Puszysty chłopak. Dobroduszny, nieśmiały i mało pewny siebie, ale bezgranicznie zakochany w Klaudii. Gotów zrobić wszystko, by nie stracić ukochanej.
🎥 Nagranie: 09.07, 10.07 (2 dni)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👩 MARTA (60)
Siostra Władka. Spokojna emerytka, mocno związana z rodziną i zawsze gotowa stanąć w obronie bliskich.
🎥 Nagranie: 08.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👩 OPIEKUNKA (50)
Empatyczna kobieta pomagająca w codziennej opiece nad Władkiem. Cierpliwa, serdeczna i pełna zrozumienia.
🎥 Nagranie: 08.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👩 EWA (50)
Zakonnica o surowym usposobieniu. Z pozoru chłodna i stanowcza, w rzeczywistości bardzo emocjonalna i skrywająca bolesną tajemnicę z przeszłości.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 10.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 MARTA (45)
Matka Małgosi. Bardzo religijna, zasadnicza i mocno ingerująca w życie córki. Wierzy, że wie, co jest dla niej najlepsze.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 PAWEŁ (48)
Ojciec Małgosi. Dobroduszny, spokojny i nieco podporządkowany żonie. Stara się łagodzić rodzinne konflikty.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 RADEK (21)
Przystojny, wrażliwy chłopak o wielkim sercu. Od lat kocha Małgosię i wierzy, że jeszcze nie jest za późno, by zawalczyć o jej uczucia.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 08.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👨 MARCIN (40)
Sprytny egoista. Charyzmatyczny manipulator, który zawsze stawia własne korzyści ponad dobro innych.
🎥 Nagranie: 10.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

🎥 WYMAGANE: demo aktorskie lub krótkie nagranie scenki
📄 Teksty dostępne w zakładce „Video”
📩 Zgłoszenia przez formularz:
👉 https://shortaudition.com/Aplikuj

#casting #Zajazd #serial #Warszawa #aktorzy #role #nagrania #castingcall

💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👩 OPIEKUNKA (50)
Empatyczna kobieta pomagająca w codziennej opiece nad Władkiem. Cierpliwa, serdeczna i pełna zrozumienia.
🎥 Nagranie: 08.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👩 EWA (50)
Zakonnica o surowym usposobieniu. Z pozoru chłodna i stanowcza, w rzeczywistości bardzo emocjonalna i skrywająca bolesną tajemnicę z przeszłości.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 10.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 MARTA (45)
Matka Małgosi. Bardzo religijna, zasadnicza i mocno ingerująca w życie córki. Wierzy, że wie, co jest dla niej najlepsze.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 PAWEŁ (48)
Ojciec Małgosi. Dobroduszny, spokojny i nieco podporządkowany żonie. Stara się łagodzić rodzinne konflikty.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 RADEK (21)
Przystojny, wrażliwy chłopak o wielkim sercu. Od lat kocha Małgosię i wierzy, że jeszcze nie jest za późno, by zawalczyć o jej uczucia.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 08.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👨 MARCIN (40)
Sprytny egoista. Charyzmatyczny manipulator, który zawsze stawia własne korzyści ponad dobro innych.
🎥 Nagranie: 10.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

🎥 WYMAGANE: demo aktorskie lub krótkie nagranie scenki
📄 Teksty dostępne w zakładce „Video”

🎬 CASTING DO SERIALU „ZAJAZD” 🎬
📍 Warszawa | 🎥 Nagrania: 6–10.07.2026 r.

👇 Sprawdź dostępne role:

👩 RENATA (50)
Ciepła, oddana i pracowita kobieta. Od lat opiekuje się ciężko chorym mężem, przez co zatraciła radość życia. Podczas pobytu w hotelu poznaje charyzmatycznego trenera fitness. Rodzące się między nimi uczucie stawia ją przed najtrudniejszym wyborem w życiu.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 08.07, 09.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

items.text:
Booking photo sessions in Los Angeles for July & August

Need headshots? I'm a portrait photographer offering packages for actors to have the essentials and help brand themselves across multiple platforms, from casting sites to social media.

These packages include headshots, full body shots, stylized photos and candids. I also offer high quality scene tapes. As a filmmaker with experience in casting, I want to make sure that you not only have the media you need, but are best marketing yourself to get the types of roles you want!

You can find more of my work on my website www.mariellebosco.com or instagram.com/mariellebosco and can contact me via DMs or email bosco.marielle@gmail.com.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — FREE ZONE**

We are looking for a **Persian-speaking woman** for a small voice-over role in FREE ZONE — a feature documentary about Exarcheia in Athens.

The role is **three sentences in Persian.** Recording can be done remotely on an iPhone — no studio, no professional equipment needed.

FREE ZONE is a DFFB Abschlussfilm, RBB Leuchtstoff funded, and dok.münchen pitch winner, heading for festival premieres!

If you're interested or know someone who might be — please message us or share. Every recommendation helps.

📩 [jasmine.alakari@gmail.com](mailto:jasmine.alakari@gmail.com)

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)
A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role 

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI 

Male | Playing Age 16–18

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a coming-of-age mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

• Headshot

• Recent photos

• Age and city where you based now

• Acting experience (if any)

• Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
🎶  Behind the magic of Shen Yun ✨ Did you know their patented 3D digital backdrop completely changes the game?
It’s not just scenery—it’s an extension of the stage. One second the dancers are right in front of you, and the next, they seamlessly "leap" right into the screen, flying into the clouds or diving deep into the ocean. It blurs the line between the stage and another world entirely!
You truly have to see it in person to believe how cool the synchronization is. Who’s coming with me to experience this ? 🎭👇
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/3F4Hyo for information on theaters near you.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE PANTOMIME ADVENTURES OF Νγγζια ល PAID ACTING ROLES We are looking for 4 key lead roles in our annual Christmas Pantomime! If you are talented musical theatre performer- ameatur or professional we are looking for you! A ditzy dame? A cunning villian? A sweet heroine? A lonely toymaker? See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - Lead Actress for short film "CONCEPTION"
We're looking for our Ellie.

"Conception" is a two-hander drama/sci-fi/horror - one location, one intense relationship, a lot of room for a great performance. Directed by Darren Henderson, produced by myself.

THE ROLE
Acting age 30–35
Ideally (but not exclusively) based in the North West of England
Comfortable with screen acting and playing nuanced, layered characters

THE SHOOT
3 consecutive days between 3–13 September (dates flexible to the right actress)
Filming in Lancaster

A bit of honesty about the project: this is a collaborative passion project. The role is unpaid, but we cover travel, accommodation where it's needed, and food on set. Our producer and crew are experienced - not first-timers - and we already have a fantastic male co-lead attached. Our aim is a calm, supportive set and genuinely strong showreel material, especially for actresses who've built up supporting credits and are ready to carry a lead.

We know paid-only is the right call for a lot of people, and that's completely fair - if it's not for you, no worries at all. If it sounds like your kind of thing, we'd love to hear from you.

📩 To apply, email: darren.a.henderson27@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you.

items.text:
Tonight is a very proud moment🎬

As a Mum/Agent, I couldn’t be prouder to be attending the London screening of *Angel of the North* this evening.

Knowing that Summer-Joules played the supporting lead role of Lucy makes this occasion incredibly special for us. Her hard work, dedication, and commitment to her acting journey have led to this wonderful milestone, and I am so excited to celebrate alongside the amazing talented cast, crew, and creative team behind the film.

A special thank you to Sean, whose talent, vision, and dedication brought *Angel of the North* to life. Not only did he direct this incredible film, but he also delivered a wonderful performance within it. It was a privilege for Summer-Joules to work alongside someone so passionate and committed to their craft. Sean's support, guidance, and belief in his cast helped create a truly memorable experience, and we're incredibly grateful to have been part of his journey with this film.

Wishing everyone involved a fantastic screening tonight. Here’s to an unforgettable evening and the continued success of *Angel of the North*.

#AngelOfTheNorth #LondonScreening #FilmPremiere #ProudMum #SupportingLead

🎭 ONLINE ACTING COURSE – JULY 2026 🎭

For young people ages 8 - 13 years looking to build confidence, develop acting skills and have fun all from the comfort home!

**4-Week Online Acting Course** starting **Monday 6th July**!

📅 Dates:
• Monday 6th July
• Monday 13th July
• Monday 20th July
• Monday 27th July

🕖 Evening sessions are 90 minutes (online)

Throughout the course students will explore:
✨ Character development
✨ Script analysis
✨ Objectives and emotional journey
✨ Screen performance techniques
✨ Confidence and creativity

Perfect for young performers looking to develop their acting skills in a supportive and engaging environment.

💷 £40 for the full 4-week course

Spaces are limited, so book now to secure your place!

📩 You can email us for more information or check out our website:

classes@mcaa.co.uk

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

Hey everyone, I need some extras to take part in a shoot this coming Sunday, June 21st starting at 9am till about 1pm in downtown Denver.

WHAT:  Short film shooting from 9am-1pm.  The scene will be the start of a wedding reception.

WHERE: Downtown Denver.

NEEDED:  5-10 extras, ages 20-50. 

I'll provide a pizza lunch for everyone!  If interested, shoot me an email at brettmanero@gmail.com.  Thanks :)

items.text:
CASTING CALL
SPIN CYCLE

Student Short Film | Aurora Cinematic Arts Department

Non-Union | Unpaid | Meals Provided

Casting Italian, Italian-American actors for Spin Cycle, a dark crime-horror short film produced through the Aurora Cinematic Arts Department.

This project is intended for actors looking to gain on-set experience, build their reel, and collaborate with other filmmakers.

“In a neighborhood ruled by organized crime, a simple cleanup job leads two wiseguys down a path of secrets, paranoia, and something lurking in their territory.”

SHOOTING LATE AUGUST EARLY SEPTEMBER, DATES TBD

SEEKING:

- JOSEPH CARUSO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 25-35

A capable mob hitman with sharp instincts and a quiet intensity. Joseph is observant, cautious, and far more intelligent than his peers give him credit for.

Lead Role

- CHRIS

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 22-30

Joseph's longtime friend and partner. Quick-witted, sarcastic, and constantly trying to lighten the mood. Chris often serves as comic relief but proves loyal when things become dangerous. A natural talker with strong comedic timing.

Supporting Role

- FRANK PALMIERI

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 55-70

An aging but powerful mafia boss. Frank is intimidating, sharp-tongued, and commands attention the moment he enters a room. He expects competence and has little patience for excuses.

Supporting Role

- MR. TEDESCO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 50-65

A burly neighborhood figure with a rough exterior and suspicious nature. Tedesco carries himself like someone who has survived a lifetime of street politics. Appears in several key scenes.

Supporting Role

- YOUNG MAN

Male | Italian / Italian-American Preferred | 18-25

A curious and seemingly harmless young man. Charming but slightly suspicious. Limited screen time.

Day Player

- BUTCHER 1

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A nervous worker involved in a gruesome operation. Physical role with minimal dialogue.

Featured Supporting

- BUTCHER 2

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A silent butcher working behind the scenes of the operation. Intimidating physical presence preferred.

Featured Supporting

- CULT MEMBERS

Male or Female | Any Ethnicity | 18-60

Members of a bizarre underground cult. Physical performers comfortable with stunt-style movement and horror elements are encouraged to submit.

Background / Featured Background

TO SUBMIT

Please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (preferred)

• If you do not have a reel, a short monologue is acceptable

Contact

kleverfilms.st@gmail.com

Please include the role(s) you are interested in and any relevant acting experience.

Non-Union • Unpaid • Aurora Cinematic Arts Department Student Production

items.title: Witam

items.text:
Hello all, I hope this is allowed to post! I’m seeking advice for my daughter (8 in August) is in love with singing, dancing and all things theatre. She’s ASD and ADHD, so I don’t know about ‘massive’ productions or anything for her, but what would you say is the best route for me to get her more involved? Any singing lessons or things like that maybe? 

Thank you in advance! Hope everyone is well 🤍✨

topComments.text: Join a local musical theatre group. My daughter has just turned 21 has ASD/ADHD and just graduated with a 1st class honours in Acting. That's how she started out. Yes she struggled/still does. But performing helped with her masking and being someone else for a while. Good luck xx

Firstly, you are a great mum to help your child with their passion. Lessons would be great for her and also if she is up for it take her to a choir as that would get her used to being around others singing. Voice acting can also be fun to learn. She can learn at home by trying to do voices for her favourite cartoons.

items.text:
✨ OPEN AUDITIONS – NEW LOCAL YOUTH PRODUCTION ✨
📍 BASED IN MOUNTSORREL, LEICESTERSHIRE 📍

Hi everyone! 👋 I’m so excited to announce I am launching a brand new youth performance group right here in our local community, and auditions are now OPEN! 🎭🎶

🎭 **A BIT ABOUT ME**
My name is Sam and I am 17 and currently studying a Musical Theatre course at a Performing Arts College. I have a huge passion for all things performance - acting, singing, dancing and choreography are what I love most! 🩰✨

I am extremely hard-working and dedicated; I achieved top grades across ALL my GCSE subjects, so you can be sure this project will be organised, professional and run to a high standard 📚✅

I will be leading, directing, choreographing AND performing alongside you - bringing everything I have learnt and experienced to make this something truly special for all of us! 🫶

💡 **WHAT ARE WE DOING?**
We are creating a magical, high-energy festive show for Christmas/Winter 2026 🎄❄️

We haven’t decided the exact show yet – 
**YOU get a say too!** We will choose together between:
• 🎭 A classic Pantomime (e.g. Cinderella, Aladdin, Snow White – all the favourites!)
• 🎶 *Nativity! The Musical* – fun, chaotic, energetic and everyone knows & loves it!
• 💬 …OR suggest your own ideas! All welcome 📝

This will include acting, singing, dancing and cheer-style choreography – something for everyone!

👥 **WHO IS THIS FOR?**
Open to ages **14 – 21** roughly anyway but open to all for auditions
Perfect for:
✅ Students / college students
✅ Anyone who loves acting, singing or dancing
✅ Cheerleaders / dance students
✅ Beginners AND those with experience – **NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED!** You just need enthusiasm, commitment and a love for performing ✨

🗓️ **REHEARSAL SCHEDULE**
✅ **STARTS MID/END SEPTEMBER 2026**
✅ ** LIKELY EVERY SATURDAY Time TBC / venue TBC but likely Mountsorrel Methodist Hall / local community centre – all central, easy access 📍

💻 **PLUS:** Occasional short Zoom sessions (weekday evenings, every 2–3 weeks)
→ Used only to run lines, sing together or check progress – **flexible, low-pressure
Great for fitting around college / work / other activities 📱

🎬 **PERFORMANCES:**
✨ **LATE DECEMBER 2026 OR EARLY JANUARY 2027** ✨
*(depending on when we can hire a venue for the show and We vote as a team! January means extra time to polish everything perfectly – less rush, better result!)
📍 **Show Venue:** likely Mountsorrel Memorial Centre (MMC) Theatre** – proper stage, lighting & sound – professional experience! 🎭

💸 **COSTS**
There is a small participation fee of £25 – £30 per person per month
⚠️ **100% TRANSPARENT – NO HIDDEN COSTS:**
This money ONLY covers rehearsal venue hire, show venue hire, scripts, music, props, production materials and admin.
👉 **I DO NOT PROFIT FROM THIS** – I am directing, choreographing and performing alongside you completely for free! Everything goes straight into making our show the best it can be ✅

✨ **ROLES AVAILABLE**
• Lead acting / speaking roles
• Solo / group singing parts
• Featured dance / cheer roles
• Ensemble / Chorus – *everyone gets plenty of stage time!*
• Also looking for 1–2 people interested in helping with creative / assistant work alongside me!

📩 **HOW TO APPLY / BOOK AN AUDITION**
👉 Comment ‘INTERESTED’ below
👉 I will then send u a private message on Facebook or instagram, whichever u prefer, (just let me know ur user if it’s instagram)
👉I will then create a group with all prepped interested to dicuss it further
👉any questions regarding auditions ect plz email samg56811@gmail.com

Auditions will be held via self tapes anytime from now till end of July. Email me if u want more details on this

Come join me – let’s make theatre magic right here in our local area! 🎶🩰✨

Please share with anyone you think might be interested! 📢💛

#Mountsorrel #Charnwood #Loughborough #YouthTheatre #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #Panto2026 #NativityMusical #LeicestershireEvents #StudentProject

items.text:
🚨 **URGENT CASTING CALL – FILMING TOMORROW (MONDAY 8TH JUNE) – PAID ROLE** 🚨

Due to a last-minute illness, Cherrywood Productions is urgently seeking **a female performer of African heritage, with Nigerian heritage especially welcomed,** for a featured role in a professionally produced historical music video filming **tomorrow in Chatham, Kent**.

🎬 **Featured on-screen role**
💷 **£175 (inclusive of travel)**
🍔 Food and refreshments provided
👗 Costume and makeup supplied
📍 The Command House, Chatham
📅 Monday 8th June 2026

The production is inspired by historical events in 1937 Lagos and we're keen to cast someone who can authentically represent the setting and characters portrayed.

No dialogue is required, but confidence in front of the camera would be an advantage.

If you or someone you know might be interested and available at short notice, please get in touch with me ASAP by DM or call/text **07857 283005**.

Please share this post—it could help us find the perfect person for an exciting project at the last minute!

🎬 Simon Burridge
Cherrywood Productions

#KentActors #CastingCall #NigerianActors #AfricanActorsUK #Chatham #FilmCasting #PaidActingRole

items.text:
Casting Call
Hi, I am the sole creator of a horror analogue series called The Haven Archivist. I am looking for 3 male actors and 1 female actress to fill certain characters. Project details: any scripts sent need to be filmed in a self tape format, project is unpaid 

Characters: 

Subject 7714 (Finch). Male, early 20s

Nigel Harrow. Current version of the main antagonist, late 40s

Kerion Marsh, brother of a missing journalist, late 20s to early 30s

Marian Scargill, director of Haven in the 90s, female, age late 30s to 40s

Please email me at Thehollowreturn@outlook.com if interested

topComments.text: Hi Grace Thomas I’ve added you as a friend so I can ask some questions through messenger.. if you prefer just email let me know and I’ll send you one. Thanks
IMBD credited? Paid? Location? Feature film?

items.text:
🎬 Darstellerin / Model für Musikvideo gesucht! (NRW, gerne auch Newcomer)

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich bin Max Konstanty :) Für den Dreh meines kommenden Musikvideos sind mein Label (END BUILD BEGIN) und ich auf der Suche nach einem weiblichen Gesicht für die Kamera. Anhand des hier gepostete Videos könnt ihr euch ein Bild von Sound und Look machen. Die neue Single (Auskopplung aus meinem Album "Luxus", das Ende August erscheint) schicken wir euch vor dem Dreh zu.

Das Projekt:
Es gibt keine komplexe Storyline oder Dialoge – der Fokus liegt komplett auf ästhetischen, cinematischen Shots, die die Stimmung des Songs einfangen. Du musst keine Texte lernen oder unbedingt Schauspielerfahrung mitbringen. Es geht um Ausstrahlung, Mimik, Posen und coole Bilder.

Wen wir suchen:

Alter: 20 bis 40 Jahre

Größe: bis ca. 1,75 m

Erfahrung ist nicht zwingend notwendig!

Die Rahmendaten:

📍 Location: Niederrhein

📅 Datum: Juli/August 2026

💰 Vergütung: 200 Euro für 5-6 Stunden Dreh plus Verpflegung.

Interesse?
Dann schreib mir einfach eine kurze PN! Bitte schick direkt Folgendes mit:

1–2 aktuelle Fotos von dir, dein Alter, Größe und ungefähren Wohnort (Handybilder reichen völlig aus)

(Optional) Link zu deinem Instagram, falls du magst.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Pn und beantworte auch gerne vorab alle Fragen :) Vielen Dank.

sharedPost.text:
Es gibt Orte, an denen Musik nicht einfach erklingt.
Sondern auftaucht.
Wie ein Atemzug aus einer Welt, die sich nur zeigt, wenn niemand hinsieht.

Dieses Album ist einer dieser Orte.

Hier sammeln sich die Stimmen der Schatten – Melodien, die zwischen Menschenblut und Vampirblut geboren wurden. Jeder Track ist ein Fragment aus Robinblutschoss, ein Funken aus einer Welt, die im Dunkeln pulsiert.

Manchmal ist es ein leiser Klang, der wie Kasdars Einsamkeit durch die Nacht schneidet.
Manchmal ein pochender Rhythmus, der die Samurai‑Städte erzittern lässt.
Manchmal ein düsteres Echo, das aus den tiefsten Hallen der Vampirfürsten zurückkehrt.

Diese Videos sind keine Musikclips.
Sie sind Risse.
Risse in der Realität, durch die du einen Blick auf das wirfst, was sonst verborgen bleibt.

Wenn du dieses Album öffnest, trittst du ein in:

– verbotene Erinnerungen  
– verlorene Nächte  
– unausgesprochene Gefühle  
– Schatten, die ihren eigenen Willen haben

Jedes Video ist ein Herzschlag.
Jedes Bild ein Geheimnis.
Jeder Ton ein Schritt tiefer in ein Universum, das dich ruft.

Willkommen in der Musik von Robinblutschoss.
Willkommen dort, wo Dunkelheit nicht endet – sondern beginnt.

🎥 In diesem Reel kündigt Michael Weilguny das 171. KBF an. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 171. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 30.06.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Ulrike Kuner 
IG Freie Theaterarbeit 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Tanzt, tanzt, sonst seid ihr verloren?

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel kündigt Michael Weilguny das 171. KBF an. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 171. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 30.06.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Ulrike Kuner 
IG Freie Theaterarbeit 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Tanzt, tanzt, sonst seid ihr verloren? 

Österreich gilt als Land der Kunst und Kultur. Doch wie geht es den Menschen, die Kunst und Kultur tatsächlich schaffen? Wie sehen ihre Arbeitsbedingungen aus? Wie steht es um Bezahlung, Beschäftigung, soziale Absicherung und Karriereperspektiven? 

Ulrike Kuner, Geschäftsführerin der IG Freie Theaterarbeit, gibt Einblicke in aktuelle Entwicklungen und Erkenntnisse aus der kulturpolitischen Arbeit für Künstler*innen. Sie berichtet über Herausforderungen im freien Kunst- und Kulturbereich, über Fortschritte bei der Verbesserung der Rahmenbedingungen und darüber, wie Interessenvertretung konkret wirkt. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die sich für Kunst, Kulturpolitik, faire Arbeitsbedingungen und die Zukunft des österreichischen Kulturlebens interessieren. 

© David Payr 

 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/9GwVTnc5y 
 

#Kultur #Kunst #Theater #DarstellendeKunst #Kulturpolitik #Künstlerinnen #Netzwerken #Wien #Leadership #Innovation

items.text: Monday 29th - New Routine - Start for just £3

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

sharedPost.text:
Why I Believe Sri Lanka Needs Clown Training?
.
Professional Intensive in Clowning & Physical Theatre 2026 🎭
Join a 1-week immersive training with Ania Upstill (USA) & Clown Compass 🇱🇰

📅 July 6th – 12th, 2026
 ⏰ 9.00 AM – 4.00 PM
 📍 Kolamba Kamatha, BMICH, Colombo, Sri Lanka. 

This one-week, certificate-based practical training is designed for clowns, actors, performers, theatre-makers, dancers, multidisciplinary artists, educators, and curious minds interested in developing embodied performance practices. Whether you are an emerging or professional artist, you are welcome to apply. This intensive is ideal for anyone curious about play, movement, and physical performance, including travellers interested in immersive artistic experiences.

What you’ll experience:
 • Daily training in clowning & physical theatre
 • Introduction to Jacques Lecoq-inspired clown practice
 • Mask work, improvisation & character development
 • Sri Lankan low-country dance (Pahatharata) & rhythm work
 • Yoga, body conditioning & breath work
 • Ensemble creation & collaborative performance making
 • Cultural exchange with local & international artists

🌍 Hosted in the vibrant BMICH Kolamba Kamatha, this program offers a unique space for intercultural exchange, creativity, and deep artistic exploration.
🌐 Medium - English & Sinhala

 Programe Fee and Structure 
 • International (Western Countries):
 Early Bird: USD 749 | Regular: USD 849
 • South Asian & Asian Participants:
 Early Bird: USD 449 | Regular: USD 549
 • Sri Lankan Participants:
 Early Bird: LKR 45,000 | Regular: LKR 55,000
Reserve your spot: Pay 30% of the fee (conditions apply) 
👥 Limited spots available for a focused and intimate learning experience. 
🎉 Stay tuned for more details!
📩 For more details, feel free to contact 
info.clowncompass@gmail.com or 
clowncompass@gmail.com 

#ClownCompass #SriLankaEvents #ArtForChange #ClownLife #MaskMagic

items.text:
Szukam producenta filmowego
Hej! Szukam producenta lub osoby z doświadczeniem produkcyjnym, która mogłaby wesprzeć projekt przy organizacji planu, harmonogramie, logistyce i budżecie. 

Realizuję krótkometrażowy film o córce opiekującej się tatą chorującym na Alzheimera. Projekt otrzymał Stypendium Artystyczne Marszałka Województwa Dolnośląskiego. 

Film powstaje we współpracy z Kinofakturą, a opiekę artystyczną sprawują Piotr Igor Pawlak, Dawid Adamowski i Jakub Lis. Zdjęcia planowane są na sierpień.

Jestem gotowa zapłacić za taką pomoc. Jeśli ktoś byłby zainteresowany lub może kogoś polecić, będę bardzo wdzięczna za kontakt. 

Marcjanna Wołoszyn

items.text:
**POSZUKIWANI EPIZODYŚCI**

Do drugorocznego filmu reżyserskiego szukamy pary epizodystów, do scen spotkania przyjaciół z czasów liceum. Zdjęcia realizowane będą na terenie Łodzi pomiędzy 7 a 10 lipca, a epizodystów szukamy na 1 z tych dni, dokładna data zostanie potwierdzona do końca tego tygodnia. Sceny odbywają się w kebabie oraz barze. 

Inne ważne informacje:
* Oferta non-profit, zapewniamy obiad,
* Wiek 25-30, 
* doświadczenie aktorskie preferowane, lecz niewymagane

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na maila [w.tomaszewska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl](mailto:w.tomaszewska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl) lub w wiadomości prywatnej.

Poniżej zdjęcia inspiracji do filmu

sharedPost.text:
🇫🇷 🇩🇪 
Dankbar für diese wunderbaren Publikumsreaktionen nach Chansons: Piaf, Brel & Me:

✨ „Sapente“ ✨ „Naturelle“ ✨ „Émouvante“

Danke an alle, die diesen Abend mit mir geteilt haben. Eure Worte berühren mich und erinnern mich daran, warum ich Musik mache. ❤️

🇫🇷 Français

Reconnaissante pour ces magnifiques réactions du public après Chansons : Piaf, Brel & Me :

✨ « Sapiente » ✨ « Naturelle » ✨ « Émouvante »

Merci à toutes celles et ceux qui ont partagé cette soirée avec moi. Vos mots me touchent profondément et me rappellent pourquoi je fais de la musique. ❤️

Stefanie Rummel, mehrfach ausgezeichnete Sängerin, lädt Sie zu einer musikalischen und emotionalen Reise ein.

Mehr als ein Konzert. Mehr als ein Cabaret.

Chansons: Piaf, Brel & Me ist eine berührende Reise durch die Musik von Édith Piaf und Jacques Brel – verwoben mit Geschichten über das Leben, die Leidenschaft und die joie de vivre.

Von den Cafés von Paris bis zu Cabaret-Bühnen auf der ganzen Welt erinnern uns diese zeitlosen Chansons und eigenen Lieder daran, was es bedeutet, tief zu fühlen, intensiv zu leben und sich durch Musik miteinander zu verbinden.

Lassen Sie sich von den Melodien tragen.
Lassen Sie sich von den Geschichten verwandeln.

www.chansons.show
Www.stefanierummel.com

Un grand merci à la Société Franco-Allemande de Francfort (Deutsch-Französische Gesellschaft Frankfurt) pour son accueil chaleureux et son engagement en faveur de l’amitié franco-allemande.

Stefanie Rummel, chanteuse primée à plusieurs reprises, vous invite à un voyage musical et émotionnel.

Plus qu’un concert. Plus qu’un cabaret.

Chansons : Piaf, Brel & Me est un voyage inspirant à travers l’univers musical d’Édith Piaf et de Jacques Brel, entrelacé de récits de vie, de passion et de joie de vivre.

Des cafés de Paris aux scènes de cabaret du monde entier, ces chansons intemporelles et compositions originales nous rappellent ce que signifie ressentir profondément, vivre pleinement et se connecter les uns aux autres grâce à la musique.

Laissez-vous porter par les mélodies.
Laissez les histoires vous trans

items.text:
Hello!

We are still casting FEMALE IDENTIFYING ACTORS (40s-60s) who are LOCAL to EAU CLAIRE, WI for a non-union feature shooting this fall entitled **Missing Cody**. *Please only submit if you fit this criteria.*

**Logline: **After the unexpected passing of her parents, a runaway is forced back to her childhood home, reuniting with her estranged siblings to pay off their parents’ debts.

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

items.title: Hello!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – "Million Dollar Personality Girl/Boy" (Short Film) 🎬
We are seeking a talented actor with exceptional range for an upcoming artistic short film, "Million Dollar Personality Boy / Girl" (MDPG), set in 1930s Hollywood and scheduled to film this summer.

Role:

BILL "BOJANGLES" ROBINSON

Male/Female African American, Ages 30–60

A legendary tap dancer whose remarkable success cannot shield him from the racial prejudices of the era.

Project Concept:

The film features a brief but powerful conversation between Bill "Bojangles" Robinson and Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major Hollywood studio. Together, they discuss the challenges and triumphs of Black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood.

Production Details:

Genre: Drama

Location: in 

Shoot Dates: Two-day weekend shoot, July 2026 (Exact dates TBD)

One filming location

Compensation: $750 flat rate

IMDb Credit, Meal, and Reel Footage Included

Preferred Qualifications:

Tap dancing experience is a plus (very light choreography required)

Strong acting ability is the primary focus

This is a unique opportunity to portray an iconic figure in Black entertainment history and showcase your talent in a meaningful and memorable role.

To Submit:

Please send your headshot, resume, and reel to:

SteaDr7@gmail.com

Subject Line: BILL SUBMISSION

Questions, recommendations, and referrals are always appreciated.

We look forward to hearing from you! 🎥✨

items.text:
**You're getting auditions.**

**People tell you you're talented.**

**So why aren't you booking?**

Here's something we wish more actors knew:

You can be incredibly talented and still not book.

Those things are not mutually exclusive.

In this free class replay, we break down the five things that stop great actors from booking and the simple fixes that make auditions feel more truthful, connected, and memorable.

Because the problem usually isn't talent.

**It's that nobody ever taught you how casting actually experiences an audition.**

🎥 Watch the replay now:

[https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N](https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N)

If you've ever wondered, "What am I missing?" This class is for you.

items.text:
Turn VO Auditions Into Bookings

Marc Graue’s audition techniques focus on making strong, authentic choices, bringing scripts to life, and standing out in a crowded marketplace. His animation character training helps actors create memorable, believable characters with unique voices, personalities, and emotional depth—skills that can elevate both auditions and bookings

items.text:
Hey there. We’re now casting for a Japanese / English dating show. Shooting in London later this year! 

We’re looking for participants:

1 Female (20-30), Japanese

1 Male (20-30) any background, British

1 Male (20-30) any background, European

1 Male (20-30) any background, Japanese 

Show will be in mix of English and Japanese languages. If interested to be in it contact me at hank@sanrokuku.com

Please put “Project Love” in the subject line and email your headshots and a little about you. It will be a fun project to work on and our goal is to stream it online. It’s unpaid opportunity and to accommodate everyone’s busy schedules we will be shooting on weekends. Application deadline is July 10.

items.text:
🤔 "Within my lifelong friendship group I'm affectionately known as Miss Jones. Why? Nobody knows. Somewhere between the passing years, many, many bottles of wine, and collective memory failure, the origin story has been lost. At this point though, the unwavering commitment from all involved only enhances the mystery.“

For our individual spotlight today, we proudly introduce the remarkable Zoe, who will be taking to the stage in the legendary role of Van Helsing this October!

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's Hall, Rochdale 
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
🤔 "Within my lifelong friendship group I'm affectionately known as Miss Jones. Why? Nobody knows. Somewhere between the passing years, many, many bottles of wine, and collective memory failure, the origin story has been lost. At this point though, the unwavering commitment from all involved only enhances the mystery.“

For our individual spotlight today, we proudly introduce the remarkable Zoe, who will be taking to the stage in the legendary role of Van Helsing this October!

🎭 About Zoe
Zoe's acting journey began with just a single drama class in high school before it was removed from the curriculum. Years later, after facing a serious illness, she decided that making a full recovery was non-negotiable—and that she would finally pursue the passions she had been too afraid to try.
She went on to complete a BTEC in Performing Arts (Acting), earning a top-tier Distinction. The course also ignited a passion for writing, leading Zoe to complete an MA in Writing for Script and Screen, graduating with yet another Distinction!

🦇 On Playing Van Helsing
"I never lost my longing for acting and attended night classes. I was absolutely thrilled to be offered the part of Van Helsing in Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really. As it's my first formal role, I am terrified but also super excited to be part of such an exciting production and talented cast, and I really hope to do this wonderful character justice!"

🤪 Definitely Not Fiction
As absurd as it sounds, qualified 19th-century American doctors really did take part in community vampire hunts, exhuming bodies in attempts to stop the undead. 
Bram Stoker collected newspaper reports of these cases and used them as inspiration for Dracula. 
Kate Hamill's frontier-doctor Van Helsing isn't just a comic invention—it's surprisingly close to history.

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's Hall, Rochdale 
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody
