sharedPost.text:
The Walk of life: Audition call
Synopsis:

The Walk of Life is based on the book of the same name by Bill Booth and adapted by Sharon Colpman and the Tag Team Writers II; it was further abridged by Kevin Foott.

It is the story of the life of Bill and his wife Cathy and the events that shaped them over the course of their marriage together, culminating in the sad passing of Bill’s beloved Cathy.

The play is going to take the form of an immersive theatrical experience at Studio Beyond during the Liverpool Fringe on 7th October 2026 and will be produced by Sharon Colpman @MIW Productions and Directed by Kevin Foott.

 

We are looking for a number of roles for the piece which include:

BILL:​​​Will play Bill at all stages of his adolescent and adult life.

​​​Male; acting age between 30 – 45

 

The BOOTHIES:​Four children playing the parts of Young Bill and his three brothers; ​​​ALAN, JOHN and RAY.

​​​Males; acting age 8 – 11

TEENAGE

CADETS:​​Two young actors playing Bill’s fellow cadets CLIFFY and KENNY

​​​Males; acting age 15 – 17

(If we are unable to identify four children, we will look to identify 3 young actors to play the roles of ‘The Boothies’; with BILL playing the other.)

CATHY’S

MATES:​​Two female actors playing Cathy’s mates/co-workers RUBY and ​​​​SHEILA

​​​Female; acting age 25 – 35

BILL’S MUM:​A strong working-class character.

​​​Female: acting age 65 – 75

 

JANE:​​​Bill and Cathy’s daughter, a female actor who potentially resembles ​​​Cathy.

​​​Female: acting age 25 – 35

 Please note, apart from Bill, these roles are not large. 

Rehearsals will take place at Studio Beyond.

If you are interested in getting involved in this exciting project please send a copy of your CV or spotlight link to Kevin Foott, kwfs@msn.com; make sure your contact details include your telephone number. Payment is Profit Share

items.text:
Szczegóły dotyczące castingu z grafiki powyżej! 🌟
Poszukujemy dziewczynki w wieku 6-9 lat do projektu dla popularnej, irlandzkiej sieci sklepów z zabawkami i artykułami dziecięcymi. 🎈
Do udziału zapraszamy dziewczynki o pochodzeniu słowiańskim oraz people of color . Zależy nam na pokazaniu autentycznego, radosnego i wielobarwnego świata dzieci – dokładnie takiego, jaki na co dzień widzimy w sklepach z zabawkami! 🧸
📸 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy w wiadomości prywatnej (DM), bądz poprzez kontakt przez naszą stronę internetową https://castella.pl/

items.title: Szczegóły dotyczące castingu z grafiki powyżej! 🌟

items.text:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 9 lub 10 lipca 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: castingotwarty@gmail.com w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)

items.text:
POSZKUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO SCENY IMPREZY- ŁÓDŹ- 30M FESTIWAL!!
Cześć! Szukają STATYSTÓW do ciekawego i spontanicznego projektu realizowanego w ramach Festiwalu 30m w Łodzi. Zdjęcia już w ten weekend!

🗓️ZDJĘCIA odbędą się w terminie 27 lub 28 czerwca (w trakcie ustaleń).

👥Szukamy młodzieży w wieku 20-28 lat

📺Na czym polega KONKURS? Realizujemy krótki metraż na taśmie 16mm bez żadnych cięć, po jednym dublu i bez procesu postprodukcji, a efekt pracy będziemy mogli dopiero zobaczyć podczas gali razem z innymi uczestnikami tegorocznej edycji.

🎞️ Film opowiada o skomplikowanej relacji trójki młodych ludzi, w której tłumione uczucia i niewypowiedziane słowa prowadzą do konfrontacji podczas imprezy.

🎬Scena do której szukamy statystów to SCENA IMPREZY- gdzie dochodzi do spięć między głównymi bohaterami. 

💲OFERTA NON PROFIT!! Oczywiście zapewnimy przyjemną atmosferę na planie i przekąski.

🙏Będziemy wdzięczni za każdy komentarz, propozycję, czy kontakt. Zachęcam do kontaktu przez wiadomość prywatną, komentarz lub e-mail j.wiech@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

Dzięki!

🎬Scena do której szukamy statystów to SCENA IMPREZY- gdzie dochodzi do spięć między głównymi bohaterami. 

💲OFERTA NON PROFIT!! Oczywiście zapewnimy przyjemną atmosferę na planie i przekąski.

🙏Będziemy wdzięczni za każdy komentarz, propozycję, czy kontakt. Zachęcam do kontaktu przez wiadomość prywatną, komentarz lub e-mail j.wiech@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

Dzięki!
items.title: POSZKUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO SCENY IMPREZY- ŁÓDŹ- 30M FESTIWAL!!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM | STASZÓW, WOJEWÓDZTWO ŚWIĘTOKRZYSKIE

We have an idea we are completely obsessed with — and we need the right people to help us bring it to life.

This is a short dramatic film made on a micro budget, the kind of project that makes you forget what it cost to make it. We believe in this story with everything we have, and we are building something that will make people stop and watch. Our goal is to submit to European film festivals.

📋 ROLES WE ARE CASTING:

👦 Boy — aged 4 to 7 (lead role)

👩 Woman — aged 25 to 33 (lead role)

👨 Man — aged 30 to 45 (lead role)

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT:

A short dramatic film — emotional, raw, and character-driven. A story about family, secrets, and discovery. We are obsessed with every detail of this project and that obsession will show on screen.

⭐ American accent preferred for all roles — but if you feel strongly about the project, reach out anyway.

📍 LOCATION: Staszów, Województwo Świętokrzyskie, Poland

🎥 SHOOT: 2 to 3 days total

💰 COMPENSATION: This is a passion project with no financial compensation. What we offer is a high-quality short film for your reel, full credit, and the chance to be part of something we truly believe will turn heads on the festival circuit. 

📩 Interested? Send me a direct message here on Facebook. I'd love to hear from you.

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone,

I’m excited to announce that I’m doing picture auditions for a KFC TV advert and I’m looking for everyday people to be part of it!  

Body Type & Look  

- A variety of body sizes and styles (note: the client isn’t considering larger frames for this particular project).  
- Unique features are celebrated — things like birthmarks, gapped teeth, or anything that makes you stand out.  
- Most importantly, I want real, relatable faces that feel like everyday South Africans.  

Applicants should be based in or around Johannesburg.  

If you’re confident, not camera shy, and have features that make you uniquely you, please send your recent studio pictures to my WhatsApp: 078 121 4807.  

@highlight

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. Audition submission deadline- 29th June.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

Vijay's Date- 28-38, Any ethnicity, large-bodied/curvy, shoot on 11th July. 

Lady in Bar- 22-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th July. 2-3 lines 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown 

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

Thanks!

items.text:
**CASTING SURREY-BASED SOCCER FAMILIES FOR TSN SPORTSCENTRE SEGMENT**

Hi all, I'm a producer working on behalf of Paper Route Studios ([https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries](https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries)), led by award-winning Executive Producer Corey Russell (credits include ***All or Nothing: Toronto Maple Leafs***).

We're currently casting **Surrey-based **soccer-loving families for a TSN SportsCentre segment tied to the opening of Western Canada’s first Jumpstart Community Soccer Pitch in Surrey. The piece will celebrate the impact of grassroots sport and the opportunities it creates for local families. 

We're looking to hear from families with an interesting personal connection to playing soccer - whether it has brought your family together, created opportunities, helped someone through a difficult time, or simply become an important part of your lives. If you have a soccer story you'd love to share, we'd love to hear from you!  

If this sounds like your family, please get in touch!

WhatsApp/text Adam at (647)562-0767 or email at [casting@thisispaperroute.com](mailto:casting@thisispaperroute.com) if interested. Thanks!

Thank you,

Adam
items.title: Documentaries — Paper Route Studios

items.text:
# **CASTING** **CALL** — Girls' Night Out Short Film **SUPPORTING & BG**

A cinematic short film about five Black women navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC.
We are currently casting Supporting Roles and Background Performers. Seeking performers from all experience levels.

SUPPORTING ROLES 
GLADYS: 40s–60s, White Female, Office colleague
COLLEAGUE #1: Late 20s–30s, White Female, Office colleague
LISA: Late 20s–40s, Female, Open Ethnicity, Possibly Voice Over, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #2: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #3: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
OLDER MAN: 60+, Male, Open Ethnicity, Apartment neighbour, One-liner

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS To authentically reflect the cultural richness & diversity of Vancouver, we especially encourage submissions from Indigenous, Black, Latino, East Asian, South Asian, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern, Mixed-Race, and White performers. All ethnicities, backgrounds, body types, abilities, and experience levels are welcome to submit.

• Restaurant Attendees
• Office Background
• Coat Check Staff
• Main Server #1 & Server #2
• Street Pedestrians
• Train Passengers

SHOOT DATES
August 21–24, 2026
Vancouver, BC
VOLUNTEER / IN-KIND PRODUCTION
Participants will receive: Screen Credit, Professional BTS Stills, Reel/Portfolio Material, Film Copy Upon Completion, Priority on Next Paid, Project, Targeting Festival Submission

TO SUBMIT
Email: **gnothefilm@gmail.com** (FULL NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION, UNION STATUS, HEADSHOT, RESUME / REEL (if available), ROLE OF INTEREST & AVAILABILITY

"Five Black women. One Friday. Everything unsaid."
[#VancouverCasting](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouvercasting?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverActors](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouveractors?__tn__=*NK*F) [#CastingCall](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/castingcall?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BackgroundPerformers](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/backgroundperformers?__tn__=*NK*F) [#SupportingRoles](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/supportingroles?__tn__=*NK*F) [#WomenInFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/womeninfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#IndependentFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/independentfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BIPOCArtists](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/bipocartists?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouverfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#GirlsNightOutFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/girlsnightoutfilm?__tn__=*NK*F)

Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subj: Non-Union Open Calls 2026

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

items.text:
THE AGON | One Night. Seven Plays. One Winner.

We invite you to The Agon - a new writing competition from The Base - on 3rd July at the beautiful Stone Nest in the heart of the West End. Taking inspiration from the Ancient Greek festivals, The Base put the call out to fearless new writers to express themselves. Nothing is off limits.
Extracts from the finalists will be performed and YOU - the audience - will vote on the winner.
The Base is bringing back a competitive, democratic, and genuinely dangerous spirit to new writing. The Base’s mission is to revive the true meaning of the great masterworks and inject excellence, depth, and vitality into new writing. Through the dramatic arts, we are inspiring audiences to engage with the Western canon on a deeper level and freeing playwrights to be bold, provocative, and courageous.

⸻

INDIVIDUAL PLAYS:

LUCIFER REX:
Set in a pre-biblical desert Lucifer, a part of God’s conscience, ventures into the world to liberate humanity from the cosmic burden of religion.

SIRENS:
A furious encounter between twenty year old Conor and middle-aged Francesca takes a dark turn.

GLOBULAR BRITAIN:
Henry is an employee at a company called Globular Britain. But his world is turned upside down when his line manager tells him that his office has been given to a new foreign employee.

THE SHORT GIANT BOOK:
A chance meeting with an amiable seven-metre-tall man at an office Christmas party sends Kate on an epic quest. But will she live to tell the tale?

MISS ENGLAND:
A working-class English family is torn apart when it is revealed what their daughter has been doing for money.

BASILISK:
Co-workers trade insults, bicker and gossip about who’s has and hasn’t been invited to the latest parties. All while casually engaged in work that has enormous, and possibly murderous consequences.

TYPE 3:
John is just an ordinary guy. So when he is visited in the middle of the night by a man dressed as Hitler, is it a fever-dream or an encounter with an entity not of this world

📍 Stone Nest, West End
🎟️ £20 Tickets

One night. Seven plays. One winner.

Tickets available here: https://tickets.stonenest.org/events/stonenest/2248542?trackingConsent=1

For access, further details, or any questions feel free to message us directly @thebasecreates

attachments.ocrText: May be an illustration of dartboard and text that says 'THE AGON ATHENS MADE ITS PLAYWRIGHTS COMPETEI IN PUBLIC. THE BASE ARE BRINGING IT BACK. FRIDAY JULY 2026 7:30PM 15 15MINSPERPLAY MINS PER FOLLOWED BY FOLLOWEDBYDRINKS DRINKS TILL LATE STONE NEST 136SHAFTESBURY AVENUE W1D5EZ W1D 5EZ SEVEN PLAYS. ONE NIGHT. YOU DECIDE. BIETETB:TPB/SS.SEOEO ន STONE NIOHE STO BASE ST'

📸 **NABÓR NA SESJĘ KIDWELL** 📸

Poszukujemy dzieci do udziału w plenerowej sesji zdjęciowej marki Kidwell.

 

📅 **Kiedy?**
29.06 – 03.07.2026 (poszukujemy dzieci dostępnych w tym przedziale czasowym – dokładny termin sesji będzie uzależniony od warunków pogodowych).

 

📍 **Gdzie?**
Lusowo (okolice Poznania, gm. Tarnowo Podgórne, woj. wielkopolskie)

 

👧👦 **Kogo szukamy?**
• chłopca o wzroście ok. 95 cm

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM | STASZÓW, WOJEWÓDZTWO ŚWIĘTOKRZYSKIE

We have an idea we are completely obsessed with — and we need the right people to help us bring it to life.

This is a short dramatic film made on a micro budget, the kind of project that makes you forget what it cost to make it. We believe in this story with everything we have, and we are building something that will make people stop and watch. Our goal is to submit to European film festivals.

📋 ROLES WE ARE CASTING:

👦 Boy — aged 4 to 7 (lead role)

👩 Woman — aged 25 to 33 (lead role)

👨 Man — aged 30 to 45 (lead role)

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT:

A short dramatic film — emotional, raw, and character-driven. A story about family, secrets, and discovery. We are obsessed with every detail of this project and that obsession will show on screen.

⭐ American accent preferred for all roles — but if you feel strongly about the project, reach out anyway.

📍 LOCATION: Staszów, Województwo Świętokrzyskie, Poland

🎥 SHOOT: 2 to 3 days total

💰 COMPENSATION: This is a passion project with no financial compensation. What we offer is a high-quality short film for your reel, full credit, and the chance to be part of something we truly believe will turn heads on the festival circuit. 

📩 Interested? Send me a direct message here on Facebook. I'd love to hear from you.

🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

items.text:
🎭 Ever fancied giving acting or improvisation a go?

I'm launching a brand new Adult Improvisation Class in Huyton, starting Sunday 5th July, and whether you've never stepped on stage before or you've acted in the past and want to sharpen your skills, you'll be very welcome.

I've spent nearly 20 years performing in improvised murder mysteries, and as co-owner of Alara Entertainment, improvisation has become a huge part of what I do. Every show is different, and thinking on your feet is a skill that's useful both on and off the stage.

These sessions will be relaxed, supportive, and packed with fun games and exercises designed to build confidence, creativity, quick thinking, and performance skills. No scripts, no pressure, and absolutely no experience required. And best of all, it's completely free of charge!

📍 An Hour For Others, Huyton
🕖 7:00pm every Sunday
📅 Starting Sunday 5th July

If you've been looking for a new hobby, want to meet new people, or simply fancy trying something different, come along and give it a go.

Drop me a message if you'd like more information or to reserve your place!

sharedPost.text:

Whether you're new to acting or ready to dive back in, this is your chance!

#CommunityEvent #ImprovClass #ActingWorkshop #AdultLearning #JoinUs #TheaterLife #CreativeExpression #ConvenientLocation

En kreativ og lækker opskrift lavet udelukkende med kartofler og simple ingredienser
Ingredienser
Kartofler: 6 mellemstore, skåret i kvarte og sat på spyd
Hvidløg: 1-2 fed, presset
Olivenolie: 2 spsk
Salt: Efter smag
Rasp: 100 g (1/2 kop)
Paprika: 1 tsk
Sort peber: 1/2 tsk
Cheddarost: 50 g (1,7 oz), revet
Jeg må lige sige noget for at få mine opskrifter til at fortsætte... Tak.

items.text:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

Möchtest du Kontakte in der Unterhaltungsbranche knüpfen? Dann ist IndustryMe genau das Richtige für dich. IndustryMe ist eine Plattform, die sich exklusiv an Personen richtet, die sich weltweit mit anderen aus allen Bereichen der Film- und Unterhaltungsbranche vernetzen möchten. Egal, ob du Schauspieler, Filmemacher, Produzent, Casting-Direktor, Musiker oder Crew-Mitglied bist oder hinter den Kulissen in den Bereichen Recht, Marketing oder Business arbeitest – IndustryMe.net ist der ideale Ort für neue Kontakte.

Melde dich noch heute an und knüpfe Verbindungen, die deine Karriere voranbringen! #IndustryMe

Looking for a Product Photographer (LA Local ONLY)

Dates: June 27–28

Rate: $500/day

Hours: 10 hours/day

Requirements:

• Experience in commercial and product photography preferred

• Please note: we are not looking for portrait-only photographers

To apply, please send:

• Your portfolio / previous work

• Contact information

Email: neekosfilm@gmail.com

Looking forward to seeing your work!

Hiring – Art Director / Production Designer

Kentwood Films International is looking for a talented and creative Art Director / Production Designer for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in Chicago and surrounding suburbs.

We are specifically seeking experienced professionals based in the Chicago area.

Position: Art Director / Production Designer

Compensation: This is a paid position (compensation based on experience)

To Apply: Please send your portfolio, resume, and/or previous work samples to: kentwoodcinemas@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for a commercial that is filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from July 29th - 30th.
**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, talent will need to be available for BOTH DAYS.**

DETAILS:
- Project: 'Alpha Aromatics' Commercial
- Filming Location: Cleveland, OH Area (Likely West Side or Lakefront)
- Shoot Date(s): 7/29 & 7/30 (Talent will work BOTH DAYS)
- Rate: $1000 plus 20% per day, guarantee 2 days.
- Usage: Web, social (TikTok, Instagram), and Amazon listings. Full buyout. Lifestyle how-to and product videos, plus stills, for two diffusers

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

OLDER WOMAN:
- Age: 60's-70's
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: ANY

YOUNG ADULT:
- Age: 20-35
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: Hispanic/LatinX

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
In order to submit for this project, you will need to film a self-tape reading the from sides linked below. Please send your video to team@angelaboehmcasting.com. 

SUBJECT LINE: "Alpha Aromatics Submission - YOUR NAME"

Audition Directions:
- Please do not tape outside
- Please have a blank background
- Please put slates at the end of the audition.
- Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!
- DEADLINE: EOD Friday, 6.26

CLICK HERE FOR THE AUDITION SIDES: https://bit.ly/ABCAASides

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

items.text:
Short student movie from Croatia "The Last Days"
Dear all,

I am excited to share The Last Days, my graduation short fiction film, a project I have been working on for the past six months together with a wonderful creative and production team.

We have launched a crowdfunding campaign, and every contribution means a great deal to us.

Through the link below, you can find more information about the film, our team, cast, production costs, and what we are raising funds for. Any donation, no matter the amount, directly helps us complete the film and prepare it for its festival journey. The names of all donors will be included in the film’s closing credits.

The film needs to be fully edited by September 1, completed and ready for distribution by September 9, and we plan to submit it no later than September 12 to this year’s competitive short film programme Kockice at the Zagreb Film Festival. Fingers crossed we will see you there.

If you are not able to donate at the moment, sharing the campaign or following us on Instagram would also mean a lot: @posljednji_dani.film

All additional information is available through the link below.

Wishing everyone a wonderful summer, and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for every kind of support.
items.previewDescription: Short student film based in Croatia. A father-daughter drama about care, resentment and letting go. photos by / Iva Lemo and Lukas Kamber
items.title: TheLastDays
